description: Analyze service order history to find repeat repairs. Identifies vehicles with multiple visits that may be candidates for trade-up outreach.

configuration.query: FROM dealer-service-orders | STATS visit_count = COUNT(*), total_cost = SUM(total_cost) BY vin | WHERE visit_count >= ?minVisits | SORT visit_count DESC | LIMIT ?limit

minVisits.description: Minimum service visits to flag as repeat
